name: @elumixor/notion-orm
description: Bring Notion database schemas/types to TypeScript

scripts.build: bun run build:bundle && bun run build:declaration
scripts.build:bundle: bun build ./src/public-api.ts --target=node --outdir ./dist --entry-naming index.[ext] && bun build ./src/cli/index.ts --target=bun --outdir ./dist --entry-naming cli.[ext]
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
